comment: Bundled default sources for the OIE Community Store. The 'catalog' source is the primary distribution channel: a prebuilt index.json (curated by PR at github.com/gibson9583/oie-community-catalog) whose entries carry an absolute installerUrl plus sha256, so artifacts can live on any https host and one conditional fetch replaces the per-repo crawl. 'repo' and 'org' sources live-crawl GitHub releases and remain the zero-infrastructure publisher on-ramp: 'repo' points at a single repository; 'org' includes every public repository under a GitHub organization or user carrying the topic (default 'oie-plugin'). Administrators can add custom sources at runtime in Settings; the bundled blocklist always applies, and catalog blocklists apply to all sources on each sync.
